notes: Unity's multi-monitor selection doesn't work so, to set windowed mode, use launch option of "-screen-fullscreen 0"
title: Xenoform

notes:
Unity's multi-monitor selection doesn't work so, to set windowed mode, use launch option of "-screen-fullscreen 0".  The nice effect this provides is clicking full-size window also makes the borders vanish.

Played game right through.  Earlier Proton glitches have gone away.  FPS 50-60 on level 5 (max) graphics.  It's Platinum rating except for the multi-monitor selection not working.
title: Xenoform

notes: Launch option "-screen-fullscreen 0" to allow placement on any monitor
title: Xenoform
